text.tspan: Designer by day, nerd by night.

flowRoot.flowPara: A logo redesign for OpenClipart was due, given that the term is "Illustration" is more commonly understood, and that we are no longer "clipping" art.
Biscuits often crumble in their packets, and become difficult to consume, especially when you take them along on your commute.
You should check out Atomic Habits, How to Take Smart Notes, Deep Work, and Getting Things Done. Take a month off, fslip through, and maybe change your life ;)
Atomicity in coding, habits, smart notes, and getting things done. The power of clarity and whatnot.

text.tspan: Typography with Helmet by Carl Enlund
